name: Bat Halloween Baby Toy - Cloud Island™
description:
Bring Halloween fun to your little one's nursery with the Bat Plush Toy for Baby from Cloud Island™. This plush toy is designed as a bat with ears, nose, wings and eyes for an adorable look. Made of soft polyester fabric, this plush baby toy makes a perfect gift for baby showers or first birthdays.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
